user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Dark Horse Espresso Bar (near AGO)
fields.description: Quick coffee and pastry stop at a popular local espresso bar within a short walk of the Art Gallery of Ontario — good for a mid-morning break before the AGO visit.

insertion_point.reasoning: User wants a short coffee break between a workshop ending at 11:00 AM and the AGO at noon; scheduling 11:15–11:45 fills that gap. Position 0 places the break before the day's listed items so it occurs immediately after the workshop and prior to the AGO visit.
